creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
Hi,

This is really not a checksum mismatch. The file was removed from its
original location but the fetch command downloaded HTML file telling
about it - hence checksum mismatch.

I'll submit a patch. In the meantime you can download the file from
another mastersite:

  http://anthesphoria.net/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/m17n-lib-1.6.3.tar.gz

Put it into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and resume building.

Nikola Lecic, the maintainer of devel/m17n-lib
fingerprint : FEF3 66AF C90E EDC3 D878  7CDC 956D F4AB A377 1C9B
